contents.nbt: {Gui:{Placeholder:1b,texture:"trigger_main_back"},HideFlags:255,display:{Lore:['{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Return to the class selection page."}'],Name:'{"bold":false,"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Back"}'},plain:{display:{Lore:["Return to the class selection page."],Name:"Back"}}}

{Gui:{Placeholder:1b,texture:"trigger_main_help"},HideFlags:255,display:{Lore:['{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Click on a trigger to change it."}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Triggers are shown in the order they are"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"handled. Whenever a key is pressed, the"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"top-left trigger is checked first if it"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"matches. If not, the next trigger is"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"checked, and so forth until a trigger"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"matches and casts its ability."}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"If the ability cannot cast and"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"\\"fall-through\\" is enabled on the"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"trigger, the next trigger is checked."}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Right-click a trigger to immediately"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"perform the trigger\'s action (e.g."}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"toggle some state)."}'],Name:'{"bold":false,"italic":false,"color":"white","text":"Help"}'},plain:{display:{Lore:["Click on a trigger to change it.","Triggers are shown in the order they are","handled. Whenever a key is pressed, the","top-left trigger is checked first if it","matches. If not, the next trigger is","checked, and so forth until a trigger","matches and casts its ability.","If the ability cannot cast and",'"fall-through" is enabled on the',"trigger, the next trigger is checked.","Right-click a trigger to immediately","perform the trigger's action (e.g.","toggle some state)."],Name:"Help"}}}

{Gui:{Placeholder:1b,texture:"trigger_main_reset_trigger"},HideFlags:255,display:{Lore:['{"italic":false,"color":"red","text":"This resets all triggers of all"}','{"italic":false,"color":"red","text":"abilities of all classes back to"}','{"italic":false,"color":"red","text":"defaults!"}','{"italic":false,"color":"red","extra":[{"color":"gold","text":"49"}," custom triggers"],"text":"You currently have "}','{"italic":false,"color":"red","text":"defined."}'],Name:'{"bold":false,"italic":false,"color":"dark_red","text":"Revert all triggers to defaults"}'},plain:{display:{Lore:["This resets all triggers of all","abilities of all classes back to","defaults!","You currently have 49 custom triggers","defined."],Name:"Revert all triggers to defaults"}}}

{Gui:{Placeholder:1b,texture:"Swiftness"},HideFlags:255,display:{Lore:['{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Current Trigger (default):"}','{"italic":false,"color":"red","text":"Trigger is disabled!"}'],Name:'{"bold":false,"italic":false,"color":"gold","text":"Swiftness - toggle jump boost"}'},plain:{display:{Lore:["Current Trigger (default):","Trigger is disabled!"],Name:"Swiftness - toggle jump boost"}}}

{Gui:{Placeholder:1b,texture:"Swiftness"},HideFlags:255,display:{Lore:['{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Toggle the default behavior of double-tapping space to dash"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Current Trigger (default):"}','{"italic":false,"color":"red","text":"Trigger is disabled!"}'],Name:'{"bold":false,"italic":false,"color":"gold","text":"Swiftness - toggle default trigger"}'},plain:{display:{Lore:["Toggle the default behavior of double-tapping space to dash","Current Trigger (default):","Trigger is disabled!"],Name:"Swiftness - toggle default trigger"}}}

{Gui:{Placeholder:1b,texture:"Swiftness"},HideFlags:255,display:{Lore:['{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Current Trigger (default):"}','{"italic":false,"color":"red","text":"Trigger is disabled!"}'],Name:'{"bold":false,"italic":false,"color":"gold","text":"Swiftness - alternative jump trigger"}'},plain:{display:{Lore:["Current Trigger (default):","Trigger is disabled!"],Name:"Swiftness - alternative jump trigger"}}}

{Gui:{Placeholder:1b,texture:"Wind Bomb"},HideFlags:255,display:{Lore:['{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Current Trigger (default):"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gold","text":"Swap Hands"}','{"italic":false,"color":"white","text":"- sneaking"}'],Name:'{"bold":false,"italic":false,"color":"gold","text":"Wind Bomb - cast"}'},plain:{display:{Lore:["Current Trigger (default):","Swap Hands","- sneaking"],Name:"Wind Bomb - cast"}}}

{Gui:{Placeholder:1b,texture:"Shrapnel Bomb"},HideFlags:255,display:{Lore:['{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Current Trigger (default):"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gold","text":"Left Click"}','{"italic":false,"color":"white","text":"- sneaking"}','{"italic":false,"color":"red","extra":[{"color":"white","text":"Holding a Projectile Weapon"}],"text":"- unchangeable: "}'],Name:'{"bold":false,"italic":false,"color":"gold","text":"Shrapnel Bomb - cast"}'},plain:{display:{Lore:["Current Trigger (default):","Left Click","- sneaking","- unchangeable: Holding a Projectile Weapon"],Name:"Shrapnel Bomb - cast"}}}

{Gui:{Placeholder:1b,texture:"Tactical Maneuver"},HideFlags:255,display:{Lore:['{"italic":false,"color":"gray","text":"Current Trigger (default):"}','{"italic":false,"color":"gold","text":"Swap Hands"}','{"italic":false,"color":"white","text":"- not sneaking"}'],Name:'{"bold":false,"italic":false,"color":"gold","text":"Tactical Maneuver - dash forwards"}'},plain:{display:{Lore:["Current Trigger (default):","Swap Hands","- not sneaking"],Name:"Tactical Maneuver - dash forwards"}}}
